title: Amends existing law relating to immunity for use of automated external defibrillators to delete provisions relating to immunity from civil damages for certain persons or entities who acquire or maintain a defibrillator.
description: Amends existing law relating to immunity for use of automated external defibrillators to delete provisions relating to immunity from civil damages for certain persons or entities who acquire or maintain a defibrillator.

title: HEALTH -- Repeals and adds to existing law to provide authority to administer CPR or use an automated external defibrillator and to provide legal immunity.
description: HEALTH -- Repeals and adds to existing law to provide authority to administer CPR or use an automated external defibrillator and to provide legal immunity.

title: Amends existing law to remove reference to prescriptions for defibrillators and to remove a provision relating to the involvement of a physician in the owner's program for a defibrillator.
description: Amends existing law to remove reference to prescriptions for defibrillators and to remove a provision relating to the involvement of a physician in the owner's program for a defibrillator.

title: Amends existing law relating to the Medical Consent and Natural Death Act to revise provisions relating to when health care may not be withdrawn or denied.
description: Amends existing law relating to the Medical Consent and Natural Death Act to revise provisions relating to when health care may not be withdrawn or denied.

title: HEALTH CARE -- Amends existing law to revise provisions regarding advance health care directives.
description: HEALTH CARE -- Amends existing law to revise provisions regarding advance health care directives.

title: Amends existing law to revise provisions relating to health care providers unwilling to conform to the desires of patients and those authorized to consent for them and to prevent the discriminatory denial of certain health care.
description: Amends existing law to revise provisions relating to health care providers unwilling to conform to the desires of patients and those authorized to consent for them and to prevent the discriminatory denial of certain health care.

title: RESPIRATORY CARE PRACTICE ACT -- Repeals and adds to existing law to replace the Respiratory Care Practice Act.
description: RESPIRATORY CARE PRACTICE ACT -- Repeals and adds to existing law to replace the Respiratory Care Practice Act.

title: Amends and adds to existing law relating to the Medical Consent and Natural Death Act to revise provisions relating to people with mental illness or developmental disability; to revise provisions relating to people who may consent to their own care; ...
description: Amends and adds to existing law relating to the Medical Consent and Natural Death Act to revise provisions relating to people with mental illness or developmental disability; to revise provisions relating to people who may consent to their own care; ...

title: Amends existing law to make codifier's corrections, technical corrections and to provide for correct terminology and code references.
description: Amends existing law to make codifier's corrections, technical corrections and to provide for correct terminology and code references.
